zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Janet Seton of Huntly於1440年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾培希爾時，她的父親Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly30歲，母親Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly30歲。她於1456年與Sir Hopkin "Hugh" Powell在英國威爾斯托爾法朋提爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1482年在英國巴金哈姆爾其其享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Janet Seton of Huntly于1440年出生在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾培希爾时，她的父亲Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly30岁，母亲Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly30岁。她于1456年与Sir Hopkin "Hugh" Powell在英国威尔斯托爾法朋提爾结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1482年在英国巴金哈姆爾其其享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catharine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Janet Seton of Huntly was born in 1440, in Perthyr, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly, was 30. She married Sir Hopkin "Hugh" Powell in 1456, in Ponthir, Torfaen, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1482, in Whitchurch, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Janet Seton of Huntly est née en 1440, à Perthyr, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Hopkin "Hugh" Powell en 1456, à Ponthir, Torfaen, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1482, à Whitchurch, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Janet Seton of Huntly 1440 in Perthyr, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly 30. Sie hat 1456 in Ponthir, Torfaen, Wales, United Kingdom Sir Hopkin "Hugh" Powell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1482 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Whitchurch, Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Janet Seton of Huntly è nata il nel 1440 nel Perthyr, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir Hopkin "Hugh" Powell nel 1456, nel Ponthir, Torfaen, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1482, nel Whitchurch, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Janet Seton of Huntlyが1440年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアペルスイルで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntlyは30歳，母Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntlyは30歳であった。1456年にイギリスウェールズトルファンポンスイルでSir Hopkin "Hugh" Powellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1482年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウィトチャーチで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Janet Seton of Huntly(이)가 1440년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 퍼스이르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1456년 영국 웨일스 토르파이 폰스이르에서 Sir Hopkin "Hugh" Powell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1482년 영국 벅잉함실르 휘트c후르치에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Hopkin "Hugh" Powell em 1456, em Ponthir, Torfaen, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Janet Seton of Huntly родилась в 1440 г. в местности пиртир, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hopkin "Hugh" Powell в 1456 г. в местности понтир, торфаен, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1482 г. в местности уичурч, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Janet Seton of Huntly nació en 1440, en Perthyr, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir Hopkin "Hugh" Powell en 1456, en Ponthir, Torfaen, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1482, en Whitchurch, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años.
